title: Iran War Live Updates: Fragile Cease-Fire Takes Hold as Both Sides Claim Victory
summary_full: Global relief at the pause in fighting was tempered by uncertainty over what happens next. Israel declared its support for the two-week truce between the U.S. and Iran, but said it did not include its war against Hezbollah in Lebanon.
